_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to use tools to make shapes and symbols that look like letters.

_source.w: We are learning to use tools to make shapes and symbols that look like letters.
y: Making letter-like shapes is an important step on the way to writing real letters.
Using writing tools builds the hand control we need for writing.
Every letter-like mark we make brings us closer to being a writer.
eg: We use a pencil or marker to make shapes that look like letters.
We trace over letter-like shapes on a worksheet or whiteboard.
We use a stylus on a tablet to create letter-like marks.
We form circular and straight marks that are starting to look like letters.
We practise making the shapes we see in our name.
We use chalk, crayons or paint to create rows of letter-like symbols.
